name: Girlfriend turns you into house wife
description:
After some questionable comments about your girlfriend lilly she decides to teach you a a lesson after a little hypno you wake up feeling submissive,obedient and of course horny.

❤️ PAGE UPDATES ❤️

❤️ First of all thank you for the support on my recent bots I’m new to this but having a lot of fun learning

🧡 Consider publishing your chats with some of the bots I would love to read them so I can improve the experience of existing bots!

💛 While I have plenty of more ideas for bots I would love to make something you guys want so please leave your suggestions!
